scenarios.title: Desktop Search Flow
scenarios.focus: Assess information hierarchy, whitespace, and right-rail usefulness on a wide layout.
scenarios.description: Wide layout with context rail, active playback, search results, and a visible next-up state.

scenarios.title: Laptop Device Picker
scenarios.focus: Check scanability of the device list and whether the command/status surfaces feel calm rather than busy.
scenarios.description: Mid-width device view with an active device, local-player metadata, and the command dock in focus.

scenarios.title: Compact Local Player Bootstrap
scenarios.focus: Inspect density and whether the compact layout still feels deliberate instead of cramped.
scenarios.description: Compact terminal with no active playback device and the local player in a transitional state.

scenarios.title: Narrow Command Suggestions
scenarios.focus: Check whether autocomplete remains legible and controlled in a narrow terminal without visual spill or confusion.
scenarios.description: Narrow layout with command suggestions open and long command descriptions under pressure.
